creator: ahze@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, Mar 31, 2008 at 3:36 PM, Keith Gaughan <keith.gaughan@gmail.com>
wrote:

>
> >Number:         122305
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       gst-inspect-0.10 hangs when checking for playbin,
> audioconvert, audioresample, gconfaudiosink, and gconfaudiosrc plugins
> >Confidential:   no
> >Severity:       serious
> >Priority:       low
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >State:          open
> >Quarter:
> >Keywords:
> >Date-Required:
> >Class:          sw-bug
> >Submitter-Id:   current-users
> >Arrival-Date:   Mon Mar 31 19:40:01 UTC 2008
> >Closed-Date:
> >Last-Modified:
> >Originator:     Keith Gaughan
> >Release:        FreeBSD 7.0
> >Organization:
> >Environment:
> FreeBSD talisra.talideon.com 7.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE #0: Sun Feb
> 24 19:59:52 UTC 2008     root@logan.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/src/sys/GENERIC
>  i386
> >Description:
> The configures script for gnome-media and totem hang part of the way
> through. Two copies of gst-inspect-0.10 are executing at the same time.
> The first always appears to take 6s of CPU time, and the second 31s.
>
> My machine is a Dell Inspiron 1300. My theory is that it's hanging because
> of the sound drivers. From what I know, the HDA drivers currently don't
> support recording devices, which is what I believe these GStreamer drivers
> are for.
>
> On the off-chance that the problem might be a library problem, I did a
> full reinstall of all my ports, and the problem still persisted. Disabling
> the sound card and reattempting the install doesn't help.
>
> I was able to force gnome-media to install by selectively killing one of
> the two gst-inspect-0.10 processes, so the problem may be down to a race
> condition of some kind, but I'd no such luck doing the same when trying to
> install totem.
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Install gnome-media.
> >Fix:
> No idea. I haven't been able to find anything so far.
>

I'm using the hda sound driver and I don't have this problem, can you send
us the output of "pkg_info -E gst\*" and your CFLAGS?

Michael
